reviews.title: No Power no service
reviews.text: The power went off for half a day while staying at the hotel.  They have no porter and did not help the guests with their luggage.  We had to walk up three flights of stairs.  My father 75 was unable to get up the stairs and I found it difficult holding a baby.  They took our pram and never gave it back or lost it.  We were unable to order warm food.  The hotel is run down and needs a lot of maintenance.  If you forget your phone there is no adaptor or charger to borrow.  The amenities in the room are very basic.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Only bar and kitchen staff
reviews.negatives: Front desk woman was very rude I was with my husband and son. When we got therer I tried to check in at exact time she roudly answered that the room is not ready even the check out is at 11 am amd check in is at 4 pm.  I went back and let her know that we need the room as my husband has leg surgery and can not stand so long need rest. She again instead of apologizing said coldly not ready yet. Then I became angry and went to a boy in front desk and told him that it is not good to have delay. He gave me the keys at 4.20

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: It's a place I revisited after going there 15 years ago, and it was quite a nice trip. The staff was friendly, but I hope they pay a little more attention to cleaning.
reviews.room_type: Junior Suite, 1 King, Sofa bed, Mountain view

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Only pool us good
reviews.negatives: Very dirty everywhere

reviews.title: Friendly and Fun
reviews.text: Great staff and location is within walking distance of many activities! Very nice pool area, and very sheltered from windy days.
reviews.room_type: Guest Room, 1 King, Poolside View, Balcony

reviews.title: The Renaissance is a boring bland hotel, not a fun resort you would expect at their prices
reviews.positives: Quick Uber trip to downtown
reviews.negatives: Rude staff, broken equipment, toilet overflowed, charged $35 a night for vehicle, pool was boring - not like a resort.

reviews.title: High school graduation trip
reviews.text: It was my son's high school graduation trip, and it was safe and comfortable.
reviews.room_type: Resort Suite, Suite, 1 King, Sofa Bed, Pool View, Balcony

reviews.title: Really not what you expect
reviews.positives: The pool area and balcony view .
reviews.negatives:
1st room we were in smelled moldy as we took our shoes off and walked thru our roo. We noticed multiple wet area on the carpet. 

We were given another room down the hall as we moved all our stiff over we left some food in the fridge just to com back to our fridge not working and all our stuff going bad.

Needless to say not what I expected after paying nearly 400 dollars a night not the birthday stay we expected .

reviews.title: Nice property overall
reviews.text: Stunning lobby. Great staff and nice ambiance at the bar for cocktail in the evening. Rooms and Hallways need a make over/refreshment.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: This hotel is the most bad howl in the worled

reviews.title: Wonderful Thanksgiving
reviews.text: Great hotel. Beautiful surroundings; excellent location and many local activities. I always recommend Renaissance.

reviews.title: Ac is set up to 70 and room was like 75 inside superhot. We cant sleep.
reviews.negatives: Im here right now writing this because We cant sleep it’s freaking hot in the room like other comment and i should listen. They already change our room because other room ac is not working but same thing ac is set up to 70 so inside the room is like 75 and we didnt even use our blancket and we’re sweating. I Don’t recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Very nice hotel, great staff and amazing pool area and facilities. We would stay here again.
reviews.room_type: Guest room, 2 Queen, Pool view, Balcony

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: nothing
reviews.negatives: very all and air conditioning was so loud in the room

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We enjoyed our stay.  The location was very convenient and the staff were friendly.  The only change we would suggest is that the blankets in the room don’t need to be so warm in a desert location.

reviews.title: Given Another Chance, I Would Stay Elsewhere
reviews.positives: The cost and location. The front desk staff was pleasant.
reviews.negatives:
The air conditioning compressors are OLD and NOISY! Even a hotel engineer admitted it. 

I tried two rooms. Same experience. So, even in very hot weather, I turned off the AC unit. 

The mini-refrigerator also buzzed loudly (in the first room). Not for light sleepers. 

In parts of the hotel, there is a musty smell. 

$30.00 for parking there is a total ripoff, in my opinion.

reviews.title: Awesome hotel and service
reviews.text: What a fantastic hotel hotel service food drinks right from checking to check out
reviews.room_type: Pure (R) Wellness Air Purifier Guest Room, 2 Queen

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I feel like the property was old and outdated. And there were a lot of little kids running around the gym and jumping on equipment. To me this hotel isn’t worth the price.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Très bel hôtel.
Qualité des services
Site enchanteur. chambres propre mais ont besoin d’être renouveler bientôt .
Très bon déjeuner
reviews.room_type: Guest Room, 1 King, Poolside View, Balcony

reviews.title: We won’t be back with all the choices we have.
reviews.positives: The lobby area is beautiful.
reviews.negatives: The bedrooms need new plumbing. Toilets clogged. No body soap in shower. Things need updated.

reviews.title: Never will I say here again I even clanged the second night
reviews.positives: House keeping was pretty ok
reviews.negatives: The place was dirty over charged us there were holes in th walls there was mold in th tub hadn’t been updated since the 80s I would be ashamed if I Marriott

reviews.title: Would not stay here again. Wish I could get my money back.
reviews.positives: The location.
reviews.negatives: Not very clean. Asked for towels never got them.  Hard to get a hold of someone. A couple of us got bit up all over our legs from the bed. Not sure if it was bed bugs or just the poor cleanliness of the hotel. Elevators need major update, the ice machines didn’t work both were such an inconvenience. The whole ambience was nice but the cleanliness killed the vibe for me and the ice machines not working elevators taking so long takes away from the vibe.

reviews.title: This hotel was expensive, uncomfortable , and an unpleasant stay.
reviews.positives: The property was close to the Palm Springs Convention Center
reviews.negatives: I requested a room with a king size bed and pull out couch. Upon arrival, there was no pull out couch. We call to inform the front desk. We were only offered a blow up mattress. The mattress seemed well enough until it sprung a leak about 2:00 am leaving my 6’ tall son cramped on a small seating couch.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: Not enough stuff

reviews.title: 4-star hotel that feels like a 2-star motel
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives: Room smells like a stale cellar, AC barely works, our bed was wet when we arrived, outdated furniture, carpet is dirty and sticky, all the towels were dirty, breakfast is overpriced, self parking is overpriced.

reviews.title: Bledd
reviews.positives: JACUZZI
reviews.negatives: It’s big, noisy and scruffy.

reviews.title: NOT WORTH THE PRICE AT ALL
reviews.positives: location
reviews.negatives: the worst view they could have they gave to us, AND I PAID FOR POOL VIEW, room phone does not work, IF YOU NEED ASSISTANCE, YOU NEED TO WALK TO FRONT DESK AND WAIT FOR A LONG LONG LONG TIME FOR A PROBLEM TO BE SOLVED, PAYING $500 RATE AND HAVING SAME EXPERIENCE OR WORSE THAN STAYING IN A MOTEL 6, SHAMEFUL FOR MARRIOT THE QUAKITY OF CUSTOMER SERVICE.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: i did get the room i ask for

reviews.title: First impression entering the hotel is very good, but issues with our room made it a bad experience
reviews.positives: Main entrance, front desk staff, bar and pool area were all very nice
reviews.negatives: The room air conditioner was very loud, and had to run almost all the time.  The toilet tank leaked and had to refill every 5 minutes.  Surprisingly, it could be heard over the AC.  Refrigerator was also noisy.  After the 1st night we asked the front desk to have someone go to the room to stop the toilet leak.  It apparently was not done.  These problems really detracted from the enjoyment of the property.

reviews.title: Very expensive for that hotel
reviews.positives: They were don’t able to control the crowds kids were diving playing rough in adult pool a couple were in the pool at 3 am security was not able to take the out the shower plumbing was broken we saw items in the bathe room from previous guest cleaned was horrible
reviews.negatives: They were don’t able to control the crowds kids were diving playing rough in adult pool a couple were in the pool at 3 am security was not able to take the out the shower plumbing was broken we saw items in the bathe room from previous guest cleaned was horrible

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I selected a room with breakfast included paid more, confirmed prior to getting it what I needed to do for the breakfast included and they simply said just give your room #. Then after we had it and I went to the front desk again to confirm the receptionist mentioned that because my confirmation didn’t note it that it was not included. They did not bother to look into it further. I would have had breakfast elsewhere had I known it was no included.

reviews.title: Overpriced 70’s stay
reviews.positives: Nice Palm Springs feeling
reviews.negatives: WAY OVER PRICED ! They charge you for a 4seasons type room but overall the service is far away from that

reviews.title: It was just okay. Would like a small refund
reviews.positives: ￼I like that it was near the casino and in walking distance to downtown Palm Springs. I did like the staff (very friendly)I did enjoy the affordable buffet breakfast. Hotel decor and the rooms are decent.
reviews.negatives: I will never stay here again. The fact that the pool closes at eight andbooking.com did not advertise that is a bit shameful it is summer and the pool is closing at 8 PM when it’s still daylight that is pretty ridiculous. The pool was very crowded with children, splashing everywhere. I also found it to be so strange and unfortunate that the hotel bar closes at 10 PM that was outrageous to me so for that matter, I will not be staying here, but I also feel that there were certain noises which I recorded very late at night. I don’t know if it was the pipes, but that kept me up the first night. ￼ I would say it is definitely not worth the $200 a night due to not being able to stay up and have a drink past 10 PM and you cannot use the pool pass 8 PM is really disappointing and we definitely did not completely enjoy ourselves. They also charge my room from the bar and ended up giving me credit after I had to go down in person and complain. I also I’m not very happy with Booking.com because I found this on Expedia cheaper on Thursday night and Friday and sent all the information and it was not approved but I will be filing a complaint because you guys say it’s guarantee price match and you guys do not do that but I will follow up and complain about this because it is unethical for you to say something and not approve

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: front lobby
reviews.negatives: room too far from elevator

reviews.title: Nice place.
reviews.positives: The water from are shower was not working and we told staff and nothing got fixed
reviews.negatives: The matter didn’t get resolved.

reviews.title: Gorgeous hotel and pool, but a few snafus!
reviews.positives: The pool, staff, rooms, conference area
reviews.negatives: Patio furniture too big for porch, bed too soft, fridge froze all my belongings,  dead cockroaches all over floor in public bathroom on 1st floor end of hall. Ice machine was empty and I had to find another floor, water was disgusting

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
The Entrance was very nice and clean..but the hallways and rooms very dusty and dirty.
There was a big hole in the wall of our floor hallway.

reviews.title: It was alright. Will not come back. Not worth what I paid.
reviews.positives: Lobby is pretty. Gorgeous Views
reviews.negatives: Bed sheets and towels smells like sewage. Ac is loud every time it kicks on. Water runs brown. Tub doesn’t drain. No do not disturb sign. There’s coffee but no cups. Sliding door handle is broken. Door has to be slammed to shut all the way. There was left over decorations from previous people. Just over all, not a pleasant stay.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Loved the location and big pool.
reviews.negatives: The rooms could be cleaner. When we arrived the balcony door was broken. Wished the pool area was a bit but cleaner as well.

reviews.title: Worst room experience we have ever had and we travel often.
reviews.positives: We liked the centra location. The lobby area was nice with different settings.
reviews.negatives:
We had a terrible experience with the room. 
To start off the refrigerator was not working which is not good on 120 degree weather. The A/C broke which interrupted our sleep and had to move to a different room at 1:40 am. This was such an inconvenience with 2 small children.
There was no cold water at all. Not even to wash your hands or brush your teeth. 
The room had a bad smell. I would save the bad experience and book else where. Never again.

reviews.title: Well we waited 2hrs for a handicapped room and still wasn’t ready
reviews.positives: It was close to downtown

reviews.title: Disappointed😞
reviews.positives: Staff lovely, location is great. Nice pool area.
reviews.negatives: The water is scalding hot, the tvs are analog and have, fair at best, reception. Limited channels too. Desperately needs a huge overhaul technology wise.  Costs too much for self parking too.

reviews.title: service is down
reviews.positives: location
reviews.negatives: on the pool area, we could receive only 2 towels per person. The lady who provided us with the towels, checked our purses!She was rude and unprofessional. We met with that behavior a first time in this hotel.

reviews.title: I had a very nice time and would come back again.
reviews.positives: I enjoyed the pool area though you do need some new lounge chairs. All staff I had contact with were fantastic. especially the Front desk (Justun S and Gordon the concierge)
reviews.negatives: Outside the toilet in my room not flushing properly, the rest of my experiences in the hotel was wonderful.

reviews.title: Nice time
reviews.positives: The bar and the staff was exceptional!
reviews.negatives: The beds were not so comfortable. Room was a little run down

reviews.title: I won’t coming back to renaissance hotel . I booked a few hotel here in USA and foreign country. It become a dispointmen
reviews.positives: Property is nice and well located .
reviews.negatives: Our room was at least a five-minute walk from the lobby, so be sure not to forget anything—multiple trips back and forth can quickly get tiring. It was clear that the hotel was understaffed. Only one housekeeper was assigned to our floor, which had at least 50 rooms. We had to request room cleaning at least twice a day, and she usually didn’t arrive until around 5 p.m. There weren’t many staff members visible throughout the hotel. Perhaps this was due to the long weekend, but I suspect it’s more likely because fewer immigrants are working here now. This has noticeably impacted the overall atmosphere and quality of service at every level.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.positives: The location
reviews.negatives: Overpriced and they charge for everything individually

reviews.title: It was decent. The staff were great   Don’t think I could say if was worth the price though
reviews.negatives: A lot of the pool chairs were broken.  Under staffed at the pool as well.  Our room had terrible lighting. The TV channels had fuzzy pictures.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Every time I get there my rooms are not ready so I have to wait a couple hours or more before I’m able to get in my room
reviews.negatives: Waiting to get in my room even after the second time

reviews.title: Beautiful property, check out experience left a bad impression
reviews.positives: It was a beautiful space, things were clean and well kept
reviews.negatives: Upon check out I let the front desk know I was frustrated we didn’t get the room we had booked, I paid for a Mountain View room and we got corner room the starred at the side of the building and the convention center. The front desk simply replied, you booked through a 3rd party site, I will leave a note. I felt that because I booked through a 3rd party site my booking was not important or didn’t matter. We spent a lot of money for that room and I probably wouldn’t book through booking.com knowing I’m not going to get what I paid for.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Matress was sunk in and screen door was broken couldn’t lock. Customer service was not nice

reviews.title: Was expecting better.
reviews.positives: Excellent location, good amenities
reviews.negatives: AC in room was not working properly, stuffy, musty room. Bad wifi connection. Had a terrible night of sleep.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
Was happy I could get moved to room with a balcony...I originally booked a king room
But when I arrived saw that room was without one 
So was moved to a double queen room
Pool area was nice
reviews.negatives:
Unfortunately the cleanliness of my room
And hallways had been quite disappointing:(
Floor was definitely NOT vacuumed in room
Shower curtain had some sort of stain on it
One curtain on window was missing a hook and was in need of fixing...phone on night table had a whole layer of dust and grime on it...ice machines on 2 different floors were not working  do had to go to lobby bar to get bucket of ice...floors in hallways needed a good vacuuming  as well :(

reviews.title: A serviceable place to stay for my business at the nearby courthouse.
reviews.positives: Convenience, good and sensible space in the room. The bed was comfortable. Parking was convenient.
reviews.negatives: The hotel needs updating. The food (I ordered room service) was mediocre at best. Nothing about the hotel made me long to return.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Our room didn’t get cleaned on our stay (and no, we did not have a don’t disturb sign at our door), cleaning crew went to our room and took the towels leaving the room dirty and with 1 old remaining towel for us to use.

reviews.title: If we go back we would consider staying here again
reviews.positives: Really liked the lobby (smells amazing), the pool, and the beds were really comfortable! Our room also had a living room and a bedroom which was awesome so our toddler could sleep in his pack n play in the other room and we didn’t need to be as quiet as we do in other hotels. I saw other families there too, so it was great to be in a family friendly hotel!
reviews.negatives: We stayed in 2 different rooms and both felt cleanish, but there were definitely some missed spots. There’s a lot of wear and tear in the hallways as well and it doesn’t seem like they wipe down their bell hops or elevators. Tons of fingerprints and smudges everywhere. We were also alarmed that parking for 2 nights is $70. I don’t understand why hotels don’t just include that in the fee when you’re booking.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Too expensive for little attention. For me, the best thing is the adult pool area, the children's pool was dirty.  The room we stayed in had a problem with the air conditioning, which did not cool very much and it is something very important because it is very hot and for three days they did not clean the room.  In the end, I don't plan to return.

reviews.title: Just Good..
reviews.positives: The room was nice and comfortable, and the hotel was close to amenities.
reviews.negatives: There were 2 things that kind of spoiled it.  Number 1 the pool is not heated as they stated on their listing. The have a bartender that needs to learn how to make drinks.  We set at the bar and my wife ask for a drink and all he could do was act like he was concentrating and made up a bunch of ingredients which pretty much tasted terrible.  We just moved on as it shouldn't be hard to learn drinks as a bartender.

reviews.title: I’d definitely come back but I would like to see some upgrades.
reviews.positives: Excellent Staff at front desk and at bar. Great live entertainment. Nice crowd!
reviews.negatives: I think the handicapped rooms should have a walk-in shower. Any person who needs this room because their disability should not have to climb into a bathtub (which is already equipped) with a fold-down seat and grab-bars…ONCE you get in! Very disappointed to see that. Also, the shower in general needs re-caulking.

reviews.title: convenient, location, friendly staff, good pool area; room issues & parking charges irritating
reviews.positives: the loinge , pool & pool area were good. nice lobby
reviews.negatives: old noisy furnace in room, toilet that would not fully flush-gross, water that did not look pure- although the sign said it was good; and if we didnt want to drink tap water bottled water was $12 per- ouch. irritating charges for parking on top of paying an average of $450/night for the room ( including taxes).

reviews.title: Good hotel for a large group.  Good location,
reviews.positives: Location is convenient
reviews.negatives: The mattress sagged , was too soft and needs replacing,

reviews.title: Convenient for cheer competition
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly and accommodating
reviews.negatives: Rooms were outdated and there was a roach in our room at the end of our stay

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.positives: Air conditioner was stuck . They had to change the air conditioner batteries the next morning. We sweated all night

reviews.title: Okay place, expensive room service, ok drinks
reviews.positives: The lobby is clean and smells amazing. They had complementary cocktails at check in.
reviews.negatives: They “upgraded” my room upon check in without me asking but the new room was extremely far from the elevators. I specified that even if it was a smaller room i wanted one closer. He said they were all far. My tub water stopper was broken. The pools look like they need to be re painted.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Like the location and the value
reviews.negatives:
The roon phone didnt work and the tech was not able to fix it. Had to call off my phone for hotel and then go through the promps to get the front desk to get room service
Television was not working. Signal was not accepting any communication. Had to watch TV on my computer

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The pool area
reviews.negatives: The bathroom.. toilet

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The pool was nice. Hot tub was also nice but kids under 18 not allowed in.
reviews.negatives: Air conditioner was loud and kept us up.

reviews.title: Was glad I picked this Hotel over the Riviera.  Palm Springs was enjoyable.
reviews.positives: I thought the location was good but felt the pool was not In good shape.  The sides of the pool were chipping away as well as the floor of the pool.  Too much overbearing fragrance when walking into the lobby. I left a day early because of a snowstorm coming and was hoping you would offer a refund for that.  It would have been over $380 dollars which is alot of money considering i checked in late because of a delayed plane.  That is a disappointment as well.  😢
reviews.negatives: The central location was nice and staff was friendly.   Unfortunately the Renaissance needs some renovations.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I liked the location. Very nice, close the center.
reviews.negatives: I paid for 3 peoples and at the breakfast only have for 2 people.

reviews.title: IT WAS OKAY FOR SHORT STAY
reviews.positives: POOL
reviews.negatives: MATTERAS

reviews.title: It was nice but overpriced for the value
reviews.positives: The was pool big and there was a lot of seating around pool
reviews.negatives: The floors and bathrooms need updating.

reviews.title: Overall, was fine.  Nothing great, but clean hotel
reviews.positives: Pool was good but very crowded.  Not enough employees working at pool
reviews.negatives: Better food service

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Room 4210  it needs to be updated,

reviews.title: It was a great spot for the price. Nice and close to the airport and a 15mins walk to the main area of downtown.
reviews.positives: Beautiful lobby and pool area.
reviews.negatives: Rooms could use an update. Our AC was quite loud and actually started leaking and got the carpet all wet. We let the front desk know, not sure they actually did anything about it.

reviews.title: Great looking property but bad bed and little a/c
reviews.positives: Big property, feels like vacation, bar and big lobby
reviews.negatives: Bed was way too soft and the a/c barely worked

reviews.title: Nicer on the outside than the inside...
reviews.positives: We thought this hotel was a great value for the money. It's a great location and the pool area, bar and lobby are all really nice.
reviews.negatives: The A/C in our room didn't work. I called at night and they said nobody could come fix it until morning. Luckily we had a balcony with a sliding glass door so we could open it for the cool night air (and we slept with it wide open at night), but had it been really hot out we would've been in trouble. Additionally, our TV remote didn't work. Everything looks really nice until you get close. I don't think we'd stay here again.

reviews.title: Fun hotel as long as you don't pay too much for your room.
reviews.positives: The decor and lobby are very pretty, they have great artwork. Drinks at the poolside were great, food was ok but a bit pricey. The room price is pretty reasonable for an off season stay.
reviews.negatives: The pool area was run down, broken tiles and surface broken and crumbling. There was a really strong chemical smell coming from the ice room. Elevator area was a like a sauna. Landscaping was not well maintained, lots of weeds.

reviews.title: Clean pool but overall the rest of the hotel needed work and maintenance.
reviews.positives: Beautiful pool and nicely kept.
reviews.negatives: The menus were dirty and many pool chairs were broken. Lock on bathroom door was broken and another guest got locked in.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Felt clean and safe

reviews.title: All said and done. Great property and food good value. KEAN my desk service consultant was amazing!
reviews.positives: Room and pool view lovely but bathroom was distressed.
reviews.negatives: Pool lawn chairs are too stiff.

reviews.title: It was fine.  Excellent location in Palm Springs, room was nice, beautiful view of the mountains.
reviews.positives: The concierge Gordie (I think) was a big help when I checked out and had to get to the airport.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Pool was great, rooms could be updated but good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location to downtown palm springs.  The room was nice
reviews.negatives: AC very noisy,  jacuzzi not fully working and very limited pool & spa hours,  especially for a weekend.

reviews.title: Thde stay was enjoyable.
reviews.positives: The room and poo; were fine. we only ate once at the Hotel and the Buffet was fine.

reviews.title: Great stay overall!
reviews.positives: The room was beautiful and the hotel was very clean. The staff went over and beyond to ensure my family was able to stay together on the same floor.
reviews.negatives: The pool had a lot of bugs in it. Tried to find someone to skim the pool. The lounge chairs by the pool were worn and busted. They put the bad chairs upfront and the new ones in the back which made no sense. One plug in the bathroom used for blow drying hair didn’t work. Had to move to the sink.

reviews.title: Convenient to downtown
reviews.positives: Service, staff
reviews.negatives: The smell in the lobby; overused air freshener, cost of glass of wine

reviews.title: Great location, but the room mattress/room furniture was uncomfortable
reviews.positives: Bathroom needs remodeling, there was rust all over and flies comingoutof the sink. The mattress was very uncomfortable and I didn't sleep well for 3 days I was there.
reviews.negatives: The appearance and location is good.

reviews.title: It was a good place to meet up with family for Thanksgiving.
reviews.positives: Staff in the lounge was great. Concierge was also very helpful and attentive.
reviews.negatives: Signage for restaurants and restrooms were wasn't very good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Close to downtown

reviews.title: good! I would come back
reviews.positives: service, pool, breakfast
reviews.negatives: the restroom could be a little bit cleaner specially the bath walls. The towel support inside on top of bath tub is almost falling off.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The staff was very friendly, especially concierge Gordon who went above and beyond. The hotel has a beautiful pool and my kids loved playing in the main pool and the children’s wading pool. The big sandbox next to the children’s pool was a fun touch. Rooms were spacious and clean and the beds were very comfortable! We had what we needed.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast foods felt processed. Eggs had a strange flavor and fruit was mostly melon. I would have hoped for higher quality ingredients. The coffee was also not very good at the breakfast nor in the room.

reviews.title: Great spot for a short break
reviews.positives: Lovely big pool at a perfect temperature, and very friendly staff
reviews.negatives: Pretty expensive parking, though there is a reduction if you're signed up to their Bonvoy loyalty scheme.

reviews.title: Our stay was nice and relaxing with great staff and comfortable beds…
reviews.positives: The property was clean and comfortable
reviews.negatives: There’s only 1 elevator and it’s too far away from  your room…

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: ROOM SIZE.. Gentleman that checked us in was nice.
reviews.negatives: THE POOL HOURS NEED TO BE EXTENDED. The price we paid to stay we should be able to stay in the pool until 10.  We tried to not be in the sun so we went in a little later to the pool. But 2 hours is not sufficient.  There was also a lot of Lil trash and bugs in the water.

Every hotel we booked through the site had our names wrong in the reservation and employees could not find our reservation. Took the manager each time, to search in different ways to find our reservation.

reviews.positives: Frühstück
reviews.negatives:
Hotel ist komplett veraltet und in aufgebrauchtem, üblen Zustand,  Pool fragwürdiges Wasser, Liegen großteils kaputt, teilweise recht schmutzig, 
Trotz allem die Mitarbeiter waren freundlich und hilfsbereit. Aber in diesem Kontext retten die Mitarbeiter nichts. Preis-Leistung passt natürlich nicht… Möbel im Zimmer veraltet und kaputt Balkontür war kaum zu öffnen bzw. zu schließen

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Geräumiges Zimmer mit Pool- und Mountainview.
reviews.negatives: Leider waren die Betten sehr durchgelegen und das Zimmer war leider auch nicht richtig gut sauber. 25 Dollar für zwei Cappuchino mit Tip fanden wir dann auch ein wenig zu viel.

reviews.title: Schöner Aufenthalt
reviews.positives: Geräumige Zimmer, toller Pool, man hat alles was man braucht.

reviews.title: In Ordnung
reviews.positives: Als Ausgangspunkt für den Joshuatree Nationalpark war die Unterkunft ideal für uns.
reviews.negatives: Die Klimaanlage war sehr laut und im Restaurant waren leider wenig Plätze.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: In Gehdistanz zu Downtown. Grosse Poolanlage mit freundlichem Service. Wir habe auf Anfrage einen Sonnenschirm erhalten. Professionelle Rezeption. Wir konnten bereits vor dem offiziellen check-in unser Zimmer beziehen.
reviews.negatives: Leider war die Suite sehr dunkel und müffelte etwas nach Rauch. Zu wenige Sonnenschirme am Pool. Für Sonbenanbeter top, für Schattengewächse suboptimal.

reviews.title: Kurzer Zwischenstopp - wäre aber auch für mehrere Tage geeignet
reviews.positives: Wir waren nur eine Nacht hier. Sah aber alles toll aus - hätte ich mir auch für ein paar Tage vorstellen könne. Super Frühstück.

reviews.title: Schöner Aufenthalt
reviews.positives:
Nettes personal 

Schöne Außenanlagen
reviews.negatives: Ausstattung der Zimmer könnte erneuert werden

reviews.title: gut, aber die Zimmereinrichtungen müssten besser kontrolliert werden. Ein unglaublich lauter Kühlsch
reviews.positives: Die Lobby und die Pool Anlage.
reviews.negatives: Der Kühlschrank im Zimmer war unglaublich laut. Wir mussten ihn sogar ausschalten um überhaupt schlafen zu können!!!!!

reviews.title: Wir würden dieses Hotel wieder buchen
reviews.positives: Bestes Frühstücksbuffet auf unserer gesamten Reise, Porzellangeschirr beim Frühstück, tolle Poollandschaft mit immer genügend Liegen (im Juli), grosszügige Zimmer (wir hatten ein Zimmer zur Poolseite gebucht
reviews.negatives: Parkplatz kostet USD 35 pro Tag

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Das Hotel ist sehr großzügig angelegt. Schöner großer Pool mit guten Öffnungszeiten.

reviews.title: Heiße Nacht in Palm Springs: 50C plus am Abend
reviews.positives: Das Frühstück ist sehr gut für amerikanische Verhältnisse.
reviews.negatives: Wir waren dort im Juli bei ca 50C Außentemperatur - das Wasser im Pool war nicht gekühlt und es gab keine Duschen.

reviews.title: Super Preis/Leistungs
reviews.positives: Sehr schönes Hotel.

reviews.title: Tolles Hotel, jederzeit würden wir es wieder buchen.
reviews.positives: Tolles Hotel, wie man es sich wünscht
reviews.negatives: Der Whirlpool war im Gegensatz zu dem großen Pool, nicht zu benutzen.Wasser war zwar im Pool, aber stark verschmutzt.
